arts.ttl: JUVENTUS-GENOA AND PARMA-INTER MILAN TO AIR LIVE ON CBS SPORTS
arts.sum: The matchup between 36-time champion Juventus and Italy’s oldest existing soccer team, Genoa, will be live across the CBS Television Network and Paramount+ on Saturday, June 29 (1:00pm ET) and will feature a 30-minute pre-match show across the platforms. Games from Italy’s top soccer division will feature on the CBS Television Network and Paramount+ on back-to-back match days in the latest display of the league’s commitment to growth and visibility in the United States
